seo.title: Acupuncture Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your acupuncture practice. Route upset clients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Acupuncture
hero.subheading: Relief can be subtle. ReviewFlo helps you ask after visits when clients notice sleep or pain changes.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Acupuncturist Faces

items.heading: Subtle results do not scream “review me”
items.body: Clients may feel better without connecting it to a post.

items.heading: Needle anxiety shows up as harsh words
Quiet rooms are not places for sales pitches

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Send after a course milestone
items.body: Ask when they report clear change.

items.heading: Private first for concerns about treatment
items.body: Sensitive topics land with you, not Google.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Can we ask without making medical claims?
items.a: Yes. Focus on communication, comfort, and scheduling.
Private feedback helps you adjust plans before public frustration.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?

items.a: Private messages help clarify bills before stars tank.
Keep public asks about the overall visit experience.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Acupuncture Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
